subcodes.first_line: At this moment, when thou wert mentioned in the Most Holy and Most Exalted Court, and now, due to lack of opportunity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این حین بساحت امنع اقدس حاضر شما را ذکر فرمودند و حال نظر بعدم فرصت در
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @personal instructions
